title: Marketplace Manager - CarTrade Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CarTrade Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarTrade Capital India family as a Marketplace Manager in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarTrade Capital India:
CarTrade Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade Capital India!
